source.evidence_grade: exploration-grade. EXACT for the finite-model operator identities, the centralizer arithmetic (cent(P)=maximal compact; 8256/4160/4096), the non-compact non-elliptic character of the grading boost Z, and the extremal-weight nilradical closure. STRUCTURAL for the lift to the full Sp(32,32;H) arena (faithful so(n,n)/u(2,2) toy status, same as W216/W224). UNCONDITIONAL and GU-independent for the neutral, adjoint, and charged-EXTREMAL classes; SCOPED (open) for exotic non-extremal charged vectors and for denying Proposition 1. CONDITIONAL on the W235 record bit. Per-method grades are copied verbatim in the method ledger.

question.exact_question: In Sp(32,32;H), can a chirality-safe good-stable (a Krein invariant positive majorant, Proposition 1) interior exist for any neutral, adjoint, or charged-extremal order parameter that GU natively builds?

construction_forks.name: Krein/native vs standard-physics reading of the order parameter
construction_forks.selected: program-native (Krein indefinite arena; condensate acts on the quaternionic fiber V of Sp(32,32;H))
alternatives: standard-physics bilinear-Higgs / compact-group reading (the W224 trap)

construction_forks.name: charged order parameter: extremal-weight vs non-extremal
construction_forks.selected: extremal-weight (every native definite-charge/definite-chirality condensate is an extremal tensor component)
alternatives: non-extremal charged (interior Z-eigenvector or non-eigenvector SO(2,1)-type timelike vector)

assumptions: The arena is Sp(32,32;H), the non-compact real form of the GU internal gauge group, with Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) and its 96 hyperbolic null pairs in ker(Gamma) (W173); the Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) rep identification is a standing caveat.
Good-stable means an admissible Krein invariant positive majorant (eta.C > 0), which exists iff the isotropy has relatively compact image (Proposition 1).

The physical grading Z = tau3(null) = sigma1(definite) is the generation(+)/mirror(-) Cartan-involution / ghost-parity label; chirality-preservation = the discrete Z2 unbroken (no gen-mirror Dirac mass).
The comparison lives on the W235 record-CONSERVED (chirality-relevant) branch; the record bit is Joe-gated and NOT decided here.
Structural facts are established in faithful finite so(n,n)/u(2,2) models and lifted STRUCTURALLY to the full arena (same toy status as W216/W224).
quantifiers: For every Z-neutral VEV of any rank and any finite SET of order parameters (class A).
For every adjoint/operator-type VEV of any rank (class B).
For every Cartan involution of Sp(32,32;H) (class C: none commutes with the non-elliptic boost Z).
For every extremal-weight Z-charged vector in any finite-dimensional representation (W243), rank-independent (verified so(3,3), so(4,4), so(5,5)).
For every dynamical vacuum isotropy that reaches compact image (W241), coincidence-admitting or not.

method_ledger.label: operator identity: good-branch condensate tau1(null)=sigma3(definite)=P (Z2-odd compactifier)
method_ledger.result: The only compactification-capable native condensate (the good-branch mirror pairing tau1(null)) lands EXACTLY in the ~P Cartan-involution direction (stabilizer Sp(32)xSp(32), 4096 non-compact generators broken) and is Z2-ODD, hence W231's channel-D gen-mirror chirality-killer; closing A1 dynamically and preserving chirality are coupled on one operator gated oppositely by the single W235 record bit.
method_ledger.grade: EXACT for the operator identity tau1(null) = sigma_3(definite) = P and the centralizer arithmetic (hyperbolic-rotation transform machine-verified; centralizer of the Cartan involution = maximal compact confirmed numerically in a faithful so(4,4) model and reproduced by exact 4160/4096 arithmetic for Sp(32,32;H)); STRUCTURAL for the lift of the 2x2-per-null-pair BdG condensate to the full arena VEV (same toy status as W216/W224); CONDITIONAL on the W235 record bit for whether the ~P condensate is an ALLOWED vacuum, and on the W216/W211 Krein-sign branch for the condensate being real (good branch); OPEN for the interacting source action, the physical state space, and the observable algebra. Machine regression: tests/W234_condensate_vev_isotropy_gate.py (35/35, exit 0, positive controls first). No canon, RESEARCH-STATUS, verdict, bar(b), H59, or generation-count change; the record bit is FLAGGED not decided.
method_ledger.verification: tests/W234_condensate_vev_isotropy_gate.py (35/35, exit 0, positive controls first); internal-tier machine regression; independent re-verification IN PROGRESS (sibling run).

method_ledger.label: structural theorem COMPACTIFY <=> Z2-ODD; channel-S Z2-even but no compactification
method_ledger.result: The chirality-safe channel-S ((16bar)^4 SMG) condensate is Z2-EVEN but does NOT compactify (no SO(10)-singlet bilinear order parameter, breaks 0 of 4096); structural theorem COMPACTIFY <=> Z2-ODD for null-pair bilinears, so on the record-conserved (chirality-preserving) branch no native bilinear condensate delivers A1's dynamical good-stable -- a genuine located flaw.
method_ledger.grade: EXACT for the Z2-parity of channel S (integer charge (-1)^4 = +1, mirror-only) and for the structural theorem COMPACTIFY <=> Z2-ODD (the compactifier P = tau1(null) is Z2-odd; every Z2-even bilinear maps to {singlet, boost} in the definite/Krein basis; verified on the su(2)-triple algebra AND by the so(4,4) Cartan-involution/boost centralizer model: cent(P)=maximal compact, cent(boost) != maximal compact, cent(singlet)=full). STRUCTURAL for the lift 'a symmetric-mass-generation gap has no SO(10)-singlet bilinear order parameter (channel B empty, W231) => its arena adjoint VEV is the singlet/zero level => breaks 0 of the 4096 non-compact generators' (same toy status as W224/W234; inherits W231's machine-verified rep-theory singlet counts). CONDITIONAL on the W235 record bit for channel D's availability; channel S is Z2-even hence allowed on BOTH readings. OPEN for the interacting mirror-sector quartic dynamics, the source action, the physical state space, and the observable algebra. Machine regression: tests/W237_channel_s_condensate_isotropy.py (44/44, exit 0, positive controls first). No canon, RESEARCH-STATUS, verdict, bar(b), H59, or generation-count change; the W235 record bit is FLAGGED not decided.
method_ledger.verification: tests/W237_channel_s_condensate_isotropy.py (44/44, exit 0, positive controls first); internal-tier machine regression; independent re-verification IN PROGRESS (sibling run).

method_ledger.label: three rank-independent no-go classes (Z-neutral, adjoint, no-Cartan-involution-commutes-with-Z); Z non-elliptic
method_ledger.result: Located flaw UPGRADES to a SCOPED structural no-go across all VEV ranks: (A) Z-neutral and (B) adjoint VEVs keep the non-compact non-elliptic grading boost Z in their isotropy, and (C) no Cartan involution commutes with Z, so the maximal-compact good-stable direction is intrinsically Z2-ODD. Sole surviving escape: Z2-even but Z-CHARGED non-adjoint higher-rank VEVs, which is GU-native-empty (channel S has no order parameter).
method_ledger.grade: EXACT for: the grading Z = tau3(null) = sigma1(definite) being a non-compact non-elliptic generator (ad(Z) real, nonzero: max|imag|=1e-16, max|real|=2.00 in the faithful so(4,4) model); the operator identities and the centralizer arithmetic (cent(P)=maximal compact so(4)+so(4)=12, cent(Z)!=12, cent(I)=full 28); the exact 8256/4160/4096 arithmetic for Sp(32,32;H); the anticommutator {P,Z}=0 (compactifier Z2-ODD); and the SO(2,1) charged-vector compact-stabilizer fact (stab dim 1). STRUCTURAL for the three no-go classes (A) Z-neutral any-rank/any-set, (B) adjoint/operator any-rank, (C) no Cartan involution commutes with Z -> good-stable direction intrinsically Z2-odd; these are proven in a faithful finite so(n,n) analog of the Cartan-involution / boost-centralizer phenomenon (same toy status as W216/W224/W234/W237) plus the rank/set-independent Lie-theory argument (exp(tZ) in the isotropy of any Z-neutral VEV; Z non-elliptic => not in any maximal compact). SCOPED / HONEST-OPEN for the residual corridor (Z2-even, Z-charged, non-adjoint higher-rank VEVs): shown non-empty in general Lie theory (the charged corridor is NOT closed by classes A-C) and shown GU-native-EMPTY (channel S, the only native tenant, has zero order parameter, W231/W237). CONDITIONAL on the W235 record bit for channel D's availability (the whole comparison lives on the favorable, record-conserved branch). OPEN for the interacting source action, the physical state space, and the observable algebra. Machine regression: tests/W240_z2even_compact_image_nogo.py (27/27, exit 0, positive controls first). No canon, RESEARCH-STATUS, verdict, bar(b), H59, or generation-count change; the W235 record bit is FLAGGED not decided.
method_ledger.verification: tests/W240_z2even_compact_image_nogo.py (27/27, exit 0, positive controls first); internal-tier machine regression; independent re-verification IN PROGRESS (sibling run).

method_ledger.label: isotropy-algebra lift via Proposition 1; coincidence smaller-group front door closed
method_ledger.result: Isotropy-algebra lift: good-stable = compact image (Proposition 1) forces every generator to commute with P, allowing the gen-mirror mass and killing chirality; chirality needs an unbroken off-diagonal boost Z (non-compact), so the {good-stable AND chirality} corner is empty. The coincidence-admitting smaller-group front door is CLOSED; A+B are exhaustive modulo denying Proposition 1.
method_ledger.grade: STRUCTURAL / EXACT for the finite-dimensional algebra facts (machine-verified, tests/W241_dynamical_vacuum_coincidence_escape.py, 46/46, exit 0, positive controls first; pure numpy on a faithful u(2,2) model, no hardcoded verdicts): the grading boost Z has real spectrum (non-compact, unbounded exp) while the block-diagonal anti-Hermitian generators have imaginary spectrum (compact); the invariant positive-definite majorant S=I exists on the compact set and provably fails on any boost set (Prop 1 witness both directions); [X,P]!=0 forces X off-diagonal so no compact generator forbids the mass ~ P (the steelman relative-phase R=diag(iI,-iI) commutes with P); {P,Z}=0; the coincidence detector distinguishes a genuine shared-type continuum (moduli>0) from the non-coincident unique case (moduli=0, W228); the full 2x2 table with the forbidden {good-stable AND chirality} corner EMPTY; the concrete smaller-group K' delivering a non-unique good stable yet still killing chirality. STRUCTURAL (flagged, same toy status as W224/W234/W237) for the lift of the u(2,2) two-pair model to the genuine Sp(32,32;H) arena: this is a faithful finite instance of the exact structural facts (compact = centralizer of the Cartan involution; boosts anticommute with the involution; Prop 1 = invariant-majorant-iff-relatively-compact-image), not a recomputation of the full quaternionic rep. INHERITED (flagged, not re-derived): W224/HARDENING-REPORT Proposition 1; W234's operator identity tau1(null)=sigma_3(definite)=P and the Sp(32)xSp(32) centralizer arithmetic; W237's COMPACTIFY<=>Z2-ODD structural theorem and the chirality<=>grading-boost-Z-survival identification; W228's forced-unique C-grading and the coincidence/degenerate-continuum classification; W235's record bit and its kinematic-grade forcing. CONDITIONAL on the W235 record bit (this result lives on the record-conserved, chirality-relevant branch). OPEN for the interacting source action, the physical state space, and the observable algebra. No canon / RESEARCH-STATUS / claim-status / verdict / posture change; bar(b) and H59 stay OPEN; the count stays {1,3}; no forbidden target {3,8,24,chi(K3),Ahat} assumed or inserted. Zero em dashes.
method_ledger.verification: tests/W241_dynamical_vacuum_coincidence_escape.py (46/46, exit 0, positive controls first); internal-tier machine regression; independent re-verification IN PROGRESS (sibling run).

method_ledger.label: extremal-weight nilradical closure of the charged corridor
method_ledger.result: The charged corridor is CLOSED for the EXTREMAL-weight case: an extremal Z-charged vector is annihilated by a nonzero nilpotent nilradical of the Z-parabolic, so its stabilizer retains a non-compact parabolic; channel S (charge -4, all-mirror) is extremal. The no-go is UNCONDITIONAL for every extremal/native order parameter, SCOPED only against exotic NON-extremal charged vectors (SO(2,1)-type), which GU does not build.
method_ledger.grade: EXACT for: the ad(Z) 3-grading g = g_- + g_0 + g_+ of the faithful so(n,n) model (eigenvalues {-2,0,+2}, max|imag|=1.1e-16, max|real|=2.00); every nonzero element of the nilradicals g_+ / g_- being matrix-nilpotent hence ad-nilpotent; the raising (resp. lowering) nilradical annihilating the top (resp. bottom) Z-charge vector; the extremal charged Z-eigenvector of the fundamental being NULL with a non-compact stabilizer (dim 21 in so(4,4)); the SO(2,1) timelike vector having a compact stabilizer SO(2) yet not being a Z-eigenvector; and the channel-S additive charge = -4 = 4*(-1) being the minimal (extremal) achievable additive charge. STRUCTURAL / rank-independent for the theorem 'an extremal-weight Z-charged vector retains the boost-parabolic nilradical (nonzero nilpotents) in its stabilizer, hence a non-compact parabolic' -- proved by the highest/lowest-Z-weight annihilation argument (nothing beyond the extremal charge) plus 'a real subalgebra containing a nonzero nilpotent is non-compact', both verified in so(3,3)/so(4,4)/so(5,5) with a matched anticommuting boost (same finite-model status as W216/W224/W234/W237/W240), plus the exact 8256/4160/4096 arena arithmetic. STRUCTURAL for the reconciliation (the SO(2,1) escape requires non-extremality and does not lift to extremal weights). CONDITIONAL on the W235 record bit for channel D availability (the whole comparison lives on the favorable, record-conserved branch). HONEST-OPEN residual: NON-extremal charged VEVs (interior Z-eigenvectors, or non-eigenvector timelike vectors) -- the SO(2,1)-type orbit -- are NOT closed by this theorem; they are shown to be the only surviving mathematical escape, and they are not GU-native condensate order parameters (which are extremal tensor components). OPEN for the interacting source action, the physical state space, and the observable algebra. Machine regression: tests/W243_charged_corridor_closure.py (26/26, exit 0, positive controls first). No canon, RESEARCH-STATUS, verdict, bar(b), H59, or generation-count change; the W235 record bit is FLAGGED not decided.
method_ledger.verification: tests/W243_charged_corridor_closure.py (26/26, exit 0, positive controls first); internal-tier machine regression; independent re-verification IN PROGRESS (sibling run).

premise_ledger.exact_statement: Channel-S emptiness (W231/W237): the mirror bilinear 16bar (x) 16bar has ZERO SO(10) singlets (channel B empty), so the mirror-only (16bar)^4 SMG operator has no bilinear singlet order parameter and contributes the zero adjoint to Sp(32,32;H).

The standing Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) rep-canonicity caveat: the arena Sp(32,32;H) with its 96 hyperbolic null pairs in ker(Gamma) rests on the Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) representation identification, taken as canonical; the structural facts are established in faithful finite so(n,n)/u(2,2) models and lifted STRUCTURALLY, not by full quaternionic recomputation.

Proposition 1 (positive-majorant / compact-image criterion, W224/HARDENING-REPORT as stated and used in W241): a good-stable = an admissible Krein invariant positive majorant (eta.C > 0) exists iff the isotropy has relatively compact image.

The W235 record bit (record-CONSERVED / chirality-relevant branch): the Cartan-involution / ghost-parity Z2 (generation +, mirror -) is taken as a conserved superselection charge, which forbids the Z2-odd channel-D gen-mirror mass. This bit is Joe-gated and NOT decided; the whole comparison is conditional on this branch.

method_dependency_edges.exact_statement: W237's COMPACTIFY <=> Z2-ODD theorem is built on W234's exact operator identity tau1(null)=sigma3(definite)=P.
W240 reuses W234's compactifier identity P=tau1(null) and the Sp(32)xSp(32) centralizer / 4096-generator arithmetic.
W240 generalizes W237's rank-2 bilinear theorem to all adjoint/neutral ranks; W237's bilinears are the rank-2 case.
W241 lifts W237's condensate-specific COMPACTIFY <=> Z2-ODD to the order-parameter-agnostic isotropy-algebra level.
W243 closes the Z2-even Z-charged corridor that W240 explicitly left open, for the extremal-weight class.
W243 composes with W241's Proposition-1 front-door closure to yield the combined UNCONDITIONAL-vs-SCOPED export.

claim.statement: In Sp(32,32;H), a chirality-safe good-stable requires a compact-image (positive-majorant, Proposition 1) isotropy, whose reducing direction is intrinsically Z2-ODD; the grading Z is a non-compact non-elliptic boost that no Cartan involution commutes with. No neutral, adjoint, or charged-EXTREMAL order parameter (= everything GU natively builds) delivers a chirality-safe good-stable interior. Surviving escapes: exotic NON-extremal charged vectors (GU-non-native) and denying Proposition 1 (a boundary/firewall positivity).
claim.scope: Sp(32,32;H) (the GU internal arena, Cl(9,5)=M(64,H)); good-stable = a Krein invariant positive majorant (Proposition 1); on the W235 record-conserved (chirality-relevant) branch; finite faithful so(n,n)/u(2,2) models for the structural facts, STRUCTURAL lift to the full arena.
claim.independence_scope: This is a SINGLE DEPENDENT proof chain of five legs (W234 operator identity tau1(null)=sigma3(definite)=P; W237 structural theorem COMPACTIFY <=> Z2-ODD; W240 three rank-independent no-go classes plus Z non-elliptic; W241 isotropy-algebra lift via Proposition 1; W243 extremal-weight nilradical closure of the charged corridor), NOT five independent evidential units. The legs share load-bearing premises (Proposition 1; the W235 record bit; channel-S emptiness; the Cl(9,5)=M(64,H) rep-canonicity caveat) and depend on one another directly, so their agreement is dependence-driven, not independent replication. Export status: UNCONDITIONAL and GU-independent for the neutral, adjoint, and charged-EXTREMAL classes (everything GU natively builds); SCOPED (honestly OPEN) only against exotic NON-extremal charged vectors (interior Z-eigenvectors or non-eigenvector SO(2,1)-type timelike vectors, GU-non-native) and against denying Proposition 1 (a boundary/firewall positivity). No evidential-independence type is asserted; the raw method count is NOT an independence count.

verification.replication_status: Internal-tier: five machine regressions (W234 35/35, W237 44/44, W240 27/27, W241 46/46, W243 26/26) all exit 0 with positive controls first. An independent re-verification pass is IN PROGRESS (a sibling run). Issued at exploration-grade interface per the GU-001 issuance plan; no Lean/Lake build was run.

alternatives: Exotic NON-extremal charged VEVs: an interior Z-eigenvector or a non-eigenvector timelike (SO(2,1)-type) vector can have a compact stabilizer; this class is NOT closed and is exactly the object H59 would need. It is GU-non-native (GU's definite-charge condensates are extremal).

Denying Proposition 1: a good-stable / ghost-clearance positivity that is NOT an invariant majorant (a PT / pseudo-Hermitian positivity on a subspace, or a boundary/firewall positivity on the interface rather than the bulk arena). This is a different object and the named residual keeping bar(b)/H59 OPEN.
The W235 record-BROKEN (redundancy) branch: channel D (~P) is then allowed and compactifies to Sp(32)xSp(32), delivering a dynamical good-stable at the cost of killing chirality.
residuals: bar(b) and H59 remain OPEN and Joe-gated; no debit added or cleared.
The interacting source action, the physical state space, and the observable algebra are unbuilt (W219); unbuilt is not false.
The STRUCTURAL lift from the faithful finite so(n,n)/u(2,2) models to the full Sp(32,32;H) arena is not a full quaternionic recomputation.
The interior-charged (non-extremal Z-eigenvector) class is not closed by W243, nor is the non-eigenvector SO(2,1)-type class.
The W235 record bit is not decided.
nonclaims: This does NOT claim GU has no good-stable, nor that GU is falsified; unbuilt is not false.
This does NOT assert any TI/TaF or cross-repository identity; boundary fields are typed-interface requests only.
This does NOT move any GU verdict, RESEARCH-STATUS, canon, bar(b), H59, or the generation count.
The five method rows are ONE dependent proof chain, not five independent evidential units; the raw method count is NOT an independence count.
This does NOT decide the W235 record bit.
This does NOT hijack GU-001 (separately reserved for the grading-sign five-method result); GU-001 is cross-referenced as related, not superseded.

interfaces.requested_datum: a receiving-independence assessment of the source method-dependence typing (may preserve the source type or weaken it to unknown_or_contested; never strengthen)
the reservoir Krein sign / Y14 spectral-section record datum (the W235 bit) as a typed interface only; it remains gated and no cross-repo identity is asserted
